description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow situated on a rectangular grassy plot, surrounded by a few trees and featuring a flat, overhanging roof. The front facade has a large central window, flanked by two smaller windows, and a main entrance that is slightly recessed. The structure is predominantly white, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation, giving it a contemporary appearance. The side and rear views reveal additional windows and a possible back entrance, as well as a small patio or paved area. The property is landscaped with a mix of deciduous and coniferous trees, and there are three rectangular garden beds or decorative panels near the front. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding green space.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large front windows, and minimalistic landscaping on a grassy plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large central window, three garden beds or panels, and two trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, side windows, and a tall, narrow tree adjacent to the building.
description_view_2: Rear view with a prominent tree, additional windows, and a clear view of the backyard landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more side windows, a tall tree, and the edge of the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front window and scattered side windows
